query:
-- Match Feb invoice AVC IDs from NewAccount (TTI20175727333) and 2047570574 invoices
-- NewAccount AVCs: AVC000178025232, AVC000114712291, AVC000157988192, AVC000139404256, AVC000231649853, AVC000114665989, AVC400038259684
-- 2047570574 AVCs: AVC000126475851, AVC000236123970, AVC000159453090, AVC000153753498, AVC000128647502, AVC000236584215, AVC000146617142, AVC000162289647, AVC000125699295, AVC000126036975, AVC000135073222, AVC000236957055, AVC000159555335, AVC000182302605, AVC000110390989, AVC000236474785, AVC000147580198, AVC000116959596, AVC000152528562

SELECT externalId, avcId, phoneNumber, planName, status, customerName, customerExternalId, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, blitzImportDate, blitzAccountNumber
FROM services
WHERE provider = 'Telstra'
  AND avcId IN (
    'AVC000178025232','AVC000114712291','AVC000157988192','AVC000139404256','AVC000231649853','AVC000114665989','AVC400038259684',
    'AVC000126475851','AVC000236123970','AVC000159453090','AVC000153753498','AVC000128647502','AVC000236584215','AVC000146617142',
    'AVC000162289647','AVC000125699295','AVC000126036975','AVC000135073222','AVC000236957055','AVC000159555335','AVC000182302605',
    'AVC000110390989','AVC000236474785','AVC000147580198','AVC000116959596','AVC000152528562'
  )
ORDER BY avcId;

-- Also check by phone number for 9466986800 account services (phone-based matching)
-- 9466986800 account has many services - check what Telstra services exist for blitzAccountNumber 9466986800
SELECT externalId, avcId, phoneNumber, planName, status, customerName, customerExternalId, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, blitzImportDate, blitzAccountNumber
FROM services
WHERE provider = 'Telstra'
  AND (blitzAccountNumber LIKE '%946698%' OR blitzAccountNumber LIKE '%9466986800%')
LIMIT 20;

-- Check what distinct blitzAccountNumbers exist for Telstra
SELECT blitzAccountNumber, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(monthlyCost) as cost
FROM services
WHERE provider = 'Telstra' AND blitzAccountNumber IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY blitzAccountNumber
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20;
